title: Creative multilingual text animation
content: A 15-second seamless loop of creative text animation video, 4K, 30fps. About 1.2 seconds per language, the transition is achieved by text dissolution, deformation or particle dispersion, without hard cutting. The background music has obvious rhythm and strong sticking points 0-1.2's Chinese "create" · Opal optical illusion Pure black background, black and white concentric circles spread out from the center to form a visual tunnel. The white three-dimensional Chinese character "create" slowly protrudes from the depth of the center of the circle and pushes towards the lens, with bold sans-serif lines and subtle shadows on the edges. The concentric circles produce ripples and distortions as the text advances, such as ripples on the water surface. The text is completely protruding and then pauses, and then dissolves into blue crayon particles that float away. 1.2-2. 4s English "CREATE" · Hand-drawn crayon Warm yellow kraft paper textured background, rough blue crayon strokes write uppercase English "CREATE" stroke by stroke. The strokes have obvious crayon graininess and overlapping marks, and the last horizontal of E is slightly raised. After writing, the surface of the letters has a slight wax luster, and a faint pencil auxiliary line appears in the background. The text is then sucked into the CRT scan line and disappears. 2.4-3. 6s Spanish "CREAR" · Retro Arcade Dark arcade frame, the central CRT screen has fine scan lines and phosphor grains. The stereo pixel word "CREAR" with a gradual change of blue and purple rises from the bottom, and the surface of the letters has a wave-like white ripple animation, and the edge emits a neon blue light. The upper left corner of the screen has "CREDIT 00", and the lower right corner flashes "INSERT COIN". The text then pixelates and disintegrates into an indigo batik pattern. 3.6-4 .8S Indonesian "CIPTAKAN" · Batik fabric Deep indigo traditional Indonesian batik fabric background, the cloth has a fine parabola pattern. The white serif font "CIPTAKAN" slowly rises from the bottom of the fabric, like bronzing and embossing, the fabric emerges with the text to produce real wrinkles and fluctuations. After the text appears, the fabric is blown by the wind, and the golden debris is scattered around, transforming into Islamic geometric patterns. 4.8-6. 0S Malay "CIPTA" · Islamic geometry. Dark green velvet background, golden arabesque geometric pattern spreading from the four corners to the center. The white classical serif word "CIPTA" spins out from the center, surrounded by star patterns around the letters, and gold dust particles fall. The text is then engraved verbatim into the black metal plaque with a golden carving knife. 6.0-7 Thai 「สร้างสรรค์」· gold foil engraving black background, Thai "สร้างสรรค์" in gold, as if carved from an ancient temple plaque. The surface of the text has a subtle animation of gold foil peeling, revealing the dark red primer below, and the golden debris is scattered around. After the engraving is completed, the text melts into silver mercury droplets. 7.2-8. 4s Arabic 「إبداع」· mechanical page turning. The black metal page turning display takes up the entire frame, and the mechanical blades click and turn in turn. The Arabic "إبداع" composed of white pixel grids appears verbatim from right to left, with each letter flip accompanied by precise mechanical movements and slight vibrations. After the page turning is completed, the text is swept by a storm of colored samba feathers. 8.4-9. 6S Portuguese "CRIAR" · Carnival feathers. Black background, colorful samba feathers converge from the edge of the screen to the center to form a huge feather fan. The white bold word "CRIAR" bursts out from the center of the feather fan, and the feathers fly around with the impact of the text. The surface of the text is reflected with Carnival sequins, and the green, yellow and blue light spots of the Brazilian flag are flashing. The text is then initialized by black ink. 9.6-10. 8S Vietnamese "SÁNG TO" · Ink silk. On a beige silk background, black ink flows slowly from the top of the frame, gradually forming the Vietnamese "SÁNG TO". The ink creates a natural smudging edge on the silk, and some ink drops drop down to form hanging ink beads. When finished, the silk is blown up by the wind, revealing the dark lotus patterns below, and the text condenses into transparent glass balls. 10.8-12 · Optical glass A perfect transparent optical glass sphere is suspended in the center of a pure black background, and the sphere refracts iridescent astigmatism spots. Behind the glass sphere, the Japanese Chinese character "" is presented in a rainbow dispersion projection. As the glass ball rotates slowly, the text produces optical distortion of twisting and stretching separation. There are fine dust particles on the surface of the glass sphere, and then the sphere melts into a silver liquid metal. 12.0-13. 2s Korean "" · Liquid metal. In the background of the deep starry sky, silver liquid mercury drips from the top of the picture and naturally condenses into Korean "" in the air. The surface of the liquid character has a strong specular reflection, reflecting the surrounding stars. After the text is formed, part of the mercury liquid continues to drip down, forming hanging metal beads, and eventually all the metal liquid condenses into a huge silver sphere.
